name: Tavily AI Search
description: AI-powered web search that returns summarized answers with sources. Better than raw web scraping for research questions.

scope.summary: Searches the public web via Tavily API
capabilities: Search the public web for any topic
scope.data_received: Web search results and AI answer
scope.note: Your queries are sent to Tavily's servers. No personal data is included.

config.get_key_instructions: Sign up at app.tavily.com → API Keys → Create key

installer.label: Tavily AI Search
installer.description: Search the web with AI-summarized answers
